title: GhostReplay
description: GhostReplay is a client-side macro recorder for Minecraft. It records your exact keyboard and mouse inputs and replays them later with high precision.
body:
# GhostReplay
GhostReplay lets you record your exact in-game inputs and replay them as a macro later.

## What It Does
> Records keyboard + mouse input
> 
> Replays movement with tick-accurate precision
> 
> Designed for movement testing, speedruns, and experiments
> 
> Fully client-side (no server install needed)

## Use Cases
> Practice parkour and speedrun routes
> 
> Debug movement mechanics
> 
> TAS-style experimentation (without going full NASA)

## Features
> Fabric client mod
> 
> Works on Minecraft 1.21.4-11
> 
> Lightweight & performance-friendly
> 
> Modular system (easy to expand later)

## Important Notes
> Client-side only
> 
> Not a cinematic camera replay
> 
> Still under active development, expect updates

## Notes for Coders and Nerds
- Build time: ~20 Hours
- Tested for player movement, camera movement, sprinting, sneaking (although glitched, hopefully an easy patch), and block placement/destruction. 
- Does not replay anything done within a GUI, eg, Crafting Tables, Inventory, and Furnaces.
